user.title: Room setup
user.description: Select the primary TRV (thermostatic radiator valve) that controls heating in this room.

optional_devices.title: Optional devices
optional_devices.description: Optionally add an AC unit (enables cool, dry, fan, auto modes), an external temperature sensor for offset calibration, and additional TRVs for rooms with multiple radiators.

window.title: Window sensor
window.description: Optionally add a window sensor. When the window opens, all heating and cooling will be paused automatically.

calibration.title: Calibration
calibration.description: Choose how the TRV setpoint offset is calculated relative to the external temperature sensor.

presets.title: Presets
presets.description: Configure preset temperatures. Combine presets with HA automations for time-based scheduling (e.g. switch to Eco at night, Comfort in the morning).

abort.already_configured: This TRV entity is already configured in another room.

optional_devices.title: Optional devices
optional_devices.description: Update the optional devices for this room.

window.title: Window sensor
window.description: Update the window sensor settings for this room.

calibration.title: Calibration
calibration.description: Update the calibration mode for TRV offset calculation.
